## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and team transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team transitions: Aida moving to new role, Jessalynn joining as new ME, Devon leaving Webstacks next week](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Blog traffic hit all-time high (1,068 clicks, 9% week-over-week increase)](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [New content strategy focus: Integrating Webstacks' messaging framework into content creation](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Action items: Devon to share BDB website content batch, explore thought leadership topics](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

## Topics

### Team Transitions

  - [Aida transitioning to senior ME role, focusing on client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Jessalynn Jones joining as new ME, bringing tech marketing experience (Slack, Ramp, AppCues)](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Devon Wood leaving Webstacks next week, will prepare roadmap for seamless transition](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Best week yet for blog traffic: 1,068 clicks, 9% week-over-week increase](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [GA4 Explorer reports show increasing completion rates for active users](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Lead generation decreased since December, likely due to conversion panel changes](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [High-quality lead from CMS comparison blog, despite lower traffic](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Shift from download guides to middle-funnel pages for conversions](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Focus on data accuracy and varying conversion panels for high-traffic blogs](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [New messaging framework to be integrated into content creation](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Emphasis on thought leadership and "build in public" approach](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

### Upcoming Content

  - [Web3 content (5 new pieces) publishing tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [BDB website content batch ready for sharing](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Exploring thought leadership topics based on client calls and internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)

### Content Optimization Process

  - [Analyze conversion effectiveness across different content types](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Identify gaps in conversion opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Test and implement learnings from successful content (e.g., CMS comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Integrate new messaging framework into polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Devon to send BDB website content batch after the call](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

  - [Team to review impact of new messaging framework on content in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Devon to prepare roadmap for transition before leaving Webstacks](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Jakub to support and stay involved in build-in-public content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/jYNWsN5F3yCcdezAZR9_ecKohNdFwXVA?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
